title: Gayatri Mantra
intro: The most revered Vedic mantra, chanted for wisdom, knowledge and inner light.
description:
|| Gayatri Mantra ||
Om Bhur Bhuvah Svah.
Tat Savitur Varenyam Bhargo Devasya Dheemahi.
Dhiyo Yo Nah Prachodayat.
meaning: This mantra is a prayer to the Sun deity for intellect and righteous wisdom.

faq.q1: When should the Gayatri Mantra be chanted?
faq.a1: Dawn, noon and dusk — the three sandhyas — are considered auspicious.
faq.a2: Yes, anyone may chant it with devotion and a pure mind.
